hypothesis: If STR-Bamba’s multimodal pretraining on seven molecular representations creates unified latent embeddings that preserve chemical information across modalities, then the model will (i) produce latent spaces where samples cluster by molecule type (small molecules, polymers, electrolytes) and (ii) achieve higher accuracy in downstream property prediction across 99 tasks and higher fidelity in translating between representations than unimodal baselines, because the cross-attention and representation alignment during pretraining enforce shared chemical semantics across modalities.
